text.message: Oj I am going to port not race
Ok will get green then here

And my numbers rolling every hand

When you blocked and robbed me you should remeber that blue
A guys without a wheat needs immense luck to win which i dont have

I will take road if i get this trade
I can connect but i need that wheat oj
Oj will win, he doesn’t need to work with us
Then give me any 3 for port
I dont know why you are saying gg
